headings: 2-7 TYPICAL PAYROLL ERRORS AND REQUIRED CORRECTIONS.
text: - b. Missing identification numbers. If the first payroll on which an employee appears does not contain the employee's individually identifying number, the employer will be asked to supply the missing information. This information can be reported on the next payroll submitted by the employer if the employer is still working on the project. Otherwise, the employer will be asked to submit a correction certified payroll.
